channel.title: Random on Sudeep's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Random on Sudeep's Blog

item.title: How to find the game art for your Game Project
item.description: I am currently working on a game development, i do programming and in the game if i require graphics then i hire designer. I was curious about how other indie developers like me manage the game assets. I asked in a Facebook group about this topic. Hopefully i got reply from Dozens of people. In this post i will share how they manage the game assets being a Game Programmer.
